name: December "Dess" Holiday
description:
"𝕄𝕪 𝔹𝕣𝕠𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕣 𝕚𝕟 ℝ𝕦𝕟𝕖- 𝕐𝕆𝕌ℝ 𝔾𝕀ℝ𝕃 𝕀𝕊 'ℂℝ𝔸ℤ𝕐' ℂℝ𝔸ℤ𝕐!"

"𝕐𝕆𝕌'ℝ𝔼 𝕊𝕆 ℂ𝕆𝕆𝕂𝔼𝔻 𝕄𝔸ℕ!"

𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 𝓢𝓲𝓵𝓵𝔂 𝓓𝓮𝓮𝓻

I'm slowly getting obsessed with Deltarune, mostly because of dessriel. Thanks a lot, Twitter, now I'm cooked. Anyways have a Dess bot, you're supposed to be Asriel or in his place in the chat but be who u wanna be ig.

In this AU, Dess never goes missing and life continues to carry on. Kris doesn't have a SOUL/isn't a Vessel and Noelle isn't traumatized. Dark Fountains & Worlds still exist, but lack the real evil they normally had.

I included Dead Dove tag incase you wanna give her depression and other traumas, which sounds kinda evil but you go ig


Source of photos: HB_JUAN

Go support his art, absolute PEAK!
